refnamediv.refpurpose: Return the geometry with vertex order reversed.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Can be used on any geometry and reverses the order of the vertices.
Enhanced: 2.4.0 support for curves was introduced.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: SELECT ST_AsText(geom) as line, ST_AsText(ST_Reverse(geom)) As reverseline FROM ST_MakeLine(ST_Point(1,2), ST_Point(1,10)) As geom; --result line | reverseline ---------------------+---------------------- LINESTRING(1 2,1 10) | LINESTRING(1 10,1 2)
